channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Missing Helicopter in Kruger National Park Found, All Occupants Safe

item.title: Analysis of Israel’s New Death Penalty Law and Its Ethno-Nationalist Implications
item.description: Israel has historically executed only one person, Adolf Eichmann, but a new law passed on March 30, 2026, significantly changes that. Under this legislation, capital punishment becomes the default sen...

item.title: Global Markets React to Tensions: Oil Prices Rise Following Trump's Iran Comments

item.title: Lady Gaga Cancels Montreal Show After Doctor's Orders Over Respiratory Infection
item.description: Lady Gaga canceled her scheduled concert at Montreal’s Bell Centre on April 6, 2026, just hours before the performance, citing a worsening respiratory infection. The pop icon, known for her dedication...

item.title: Amaravati officially designated as Andhra Pradesh's capital after long legal battle
item.description: After a prolonged legal and political struggle, Amaravati has officially become the capital of Andhra Pradesh. This development follows the assent of President Droupadi Murmu to the Andhra Pradesh Reo...

item.title: Supreme Court Examines Legality of Standby Funds in 2024-2026 National Budgets
item.description: The Supreme Court recently held oral arguments on whether the unprogrammed appropriations included in the national budgets for 2024, 2025, and 2026 are legal. Unprogrammed appropriations, also called ...

item.title: Tensions escalate as US and Israel demand Iran reopen Strait of Hormuz amid strikes
item.description: Tensions between the US, Israel, and Iran reached a critical point on April 7, 2026, as President Donald Trump set a hard deadline for Iran to reopen the Strait of Hormuz. Trump warned that failure to...

item.title: Kwara CAN appreciates Senator Saliu Mustapha for supporting Christians and promoting religious unity
item.description: The Christian Association of Nigeria (CAN) in Kwara State don commend Senator Saliu Mustapha for di support wey e dey give di Christian community. Di commendation happen during di Kwara CAN Easter Pic...

item.title: Challenges of Moonlighting and Underfunding in South Africa’s Public Health System
item.description: In South Africa, public sector nurses and doctors often moonlight in private healthcare to make ends meet, but regulatory oversight is weak and enforcement inconsistent. Professional nurse Nomsa Dlami...
